message:
The other day, I was out walking my dog, Max, when we stumbled upon a little adventure. A sudden downpour caught us off guard, and I couldn't help but chuckle at my drenched state while Max happily splashed in every puddle. Thankfully, I had my trusty emergency poncho tucked in my bag, and I finally felt like *the* prepared one for once! It was a nice reminder that being ready can turn an unexpected moment into a fun story. 

Have you ever found yourself unexpectedly prepared? 🐾🌧️
